head.title: CyanShip
head.description: Sign in to access the app.

home_page.heading: CyanShip
home_page.description: Landing page placeholder. Sign in to access the app.

signin.heading: Sign in to CyanShip
signin.subheading: Launch your SaaS faster with production-ready auth, payments, and more
signin.forgot_password_sent: If an account with this email exists, we sent a password reset link
signin.magic_link_sent_description: We sent a link to <bold>{email}</bold>. Check your inbox and click the link to sign in.
signin.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes or use "Forgot password?"
signin.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
signin.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again
signin.terms_agree: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
signin.terms_required: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue

recovery.title: Account deactivated
recovery.description: Your account was deleted on {date}. It will be permanently removed in {days} days.

callback.account_deleted_description: Your account is scheduled for deletion. Restore it by clicking the button below.
callback.terms_agree: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
callback.terms_required: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue

verify.error_description: The sign-in link you used is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
verify.deleted_description: Your account has been deactivated. You have 30 days to restore it — just sign in during that time.

reset_password.heading: Set new password
reset_password.success_toast: Password changed. Sign in with your new password.
reset_password.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset_password.error_invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
reset_password.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.magic_link_sent: A sign-in link has been sent to your email

users.onboarding_required: Please complete your profile to continue

auth.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again
auth.invalid_magic_link: The link is invalid or has expired

payments.already_subscribed: You already have an active subscription.
payments.subscription_required: An active subscription is required for access.
payments.no_billing_account: No billing account found. Please subscribe first.

users.insufficient_executions: Not enough executions for this operation. Purchase more or upgrade your subscription.
users.executions_reservation_active: A previous request is still being processed. Wait a few seconds and try again.

generic.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again in {minutes} minutes
generic.email_send_failed: Failed to send the email. Please try again later
generic.internal_error: Server error occurred. Please try again later
generic.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again later

ai.ai_limit_exhausted: AI request limit has been reached.
ai.ai_rate_limit_exceeded: Too many AI requests. Please try again later.
ai.ai_provider_error: AI is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ai.ai_message_too_long: Your message is too long for the current conversation. Try shortening it or clearing chat history.

storage.avatar_upload_failed: Failed to upload photo. Please try again later
storage.avatar_file_key_invalid: Upload session expired. Please try again
storage.avatar_upload_not_found: We couldn't find your uploaded photo. Please try again
storage.avatar_upload_invalid: This file can't be used as a photo. Please try a different image

ai_chat_page.heading: AI Chat
ai_chat_page.empty_state: Send a message to start a conversation with AI.
ai_chat_page.suggestion_1: What technologies do you use and why?
ai_chat_page.suggestion_2: How long does it take to build an MVP?
ai_chat_page.suggestion_3: What's included in the development cost?
ai_chat_page.suggestion_4: How are you different from other agencies?
ai_chat_page.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.
ai_chat_page.non_refundable_warning: Once AI starts responding, executions are not refunded if you cancel.

clear_dialog.title: Clear chat history?
clear_dialog.description: All messages will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

transactions.heading: Transaction history
transactions.empty: No transaction history yet. Try features above.

ai_chat_teaser.heading: AI Chat
ai_chat_teaser.description: Try real AI integration — send a message and see how executions billing works live.

form.heading: Personal info
form.name_too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters
form.name_too_long: Name must be no more than 50 characters
form.name_invalid_chars: Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes

avatar.supported_formats: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Max 5 MB
avatar.delete_confirm_description: Your avatar will be replaced with initials
avatar.file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB
avatar.unsupported_format: Unsupported format. Please use JPEG, PNG or WebP

security.heading: Security
security.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
security.password_same_as_current: New password must be different from the current one
security.password_changed: Password changed. Other devices have been signed out
security.error_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes
security.error_generic: Failed to complete the operation. Please try again later

danger_zone.heading: Danger zone
danger_zone.delete_description: After deletion you have 30 days to restore your account.

delete_account_modal.title: Delete account
delete_account_modal.description: Are you sure? Your account will be deactivated. You will have 30 days to restore it.
delete_account_modal.magic_link_sent: Confirmation link sent to your email
delete_account_modal.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes
delete_account_modal.magic_link_sent_description: A confirmation link to delete your account has been sent to your address. The link is valid for 15 minutes.
delete_account_modal.error_generic: Failed to complete the operation. Please try again later

billing_page.heading: Billing
billing_page.description: Manage your subscription and executions. All payments are processed securely via Stripe.

demo_banner.title: Stripe Test Mode Demo
demo_banner.description: This is a live Stripe integration demo. No real charges will be made.
demo_banner.test_card: Test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242 · Any future date · Any CVC

active.heading: Your Subscription
active.cancel_notice: Your subscription will end at the current period's close.

callback.refresh_error: Failed to update data. Please reload the page.

billing_page.checkout_terms_note: By proceeding, you agree to the <terms>payment terms</terms>.

reset.description: Deletes subscriptions, executions and payment history in Stripe and the database.
reset.dialog_description: All subscriptions, executions and payment history will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

terms_reaccept.title: Updated terms
terms_reaccept.description: Our Terms of Service or Privacy Policy have been updated. Please review and accept the changes to continue.
terms_reaccept.agree: I agree to the updated <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
terms_reaccept.required: You must accept the updated terms to continue.
terms_reaccept.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
